title: 100 PCS 11mm x 150mm Hot Glue Sticks, Hot Melt Gun Sticks, Clear Glue Gun Sticks for DIY Craft Art
features: NATURAL AND LONG LASTING - Using natural resins as materials, these hot melt glue sticks are ideal DIY materials with fast melting, exquisite high transparency, good thermal stability, and excellent adhesion.

COMPACT SIZE - The package includes a total of 100 glue gun sticks, each with a diameter of 11mm and a length of 150mm, cut evenly and smoothly, lightweight and portable, and very convenient to use and store.

EASY TO USE - First, prepare a glue gun, check the power supply, push the 11mm clear glue sticks to the top of the catheter, place it on the table, preheat for 1-3 minutes, and finally aim the spray gun nozzle at the object, press the trigger to dispense glue.

WIDELY APPLICABLE - They stick well and are suitable for a wide variety of materials, making these 11mm hot glue sticks ideal for bonding paper, cartons/boxes, wood blocks/chips, cloth, plastics, ceramics, hairpins, and light glass.

WORRY-FREE PURCHASE - If you have any dissatisfaction with our 11mm hot melt glue sticks within 30 days after receiving the product, you can contact us for a refund. Feel free to email us and let us know if you have any questions or feedback about our product. We are dedicated to providing you a satisfactory shopping satisfaction.
description: Product Description Why us EVA resin high transparency strong adhesive fast melt ideal for DIY easy to use value pack wide application Specifications Material: EVA Color: Clear / transparent Hot Glue Sticks hot melt glue sticks Made of natural resin, it will not produce pungent odor when melted at high temperature, which is friendly to your body. Full of toughness, the clear glue sticks can be bent arbitrarily and quickly return to shape. High viscosity, not easy to age. Hot glue sticks with suitable length better reduces the burden on your hands, and it makes your manual projects more convenient. Great for gluing or repairing small pieces of wood, dried flowers, plastic crafts, clothing, accessories, lightweight models, etc. Colorless transparent glue sticks are suitable for more projects, especially when making handicrafts, you don't have to worry about the color of the hot glue sticks being too obvious. These hot melt glue sticks are lightweight, and they are small size, you can easily carry them out if you need to used for some projects at other place. These hot glue gun sticks can be stored for a long time, ready for you to use it anytime. With these glue sticks, you can fully enjoy the fun of DIY craft
